title: apicra reticulata
intro: Apicra reticulata, also known as the Desert Marigold, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Apicra reticulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve coughs, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis. Apicra reticulata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be taken internally or used topically to soothe skin irritations.
